name: wxcode-admin-bloom-nonprofit
title: Bloom Nonprofit Admin
description: Warm-optimistic light-mode admin dashboard for nonprofit fundraising and donor management — org/program switcher sidebar, KPI cards, campaigns progress, donations trend chart, donor-segments donut, and recent donations table. Original archetype with emerald + coral accent palette.

query.en: Build me a nonprofit fundraising admin dashboard — left sidebar with org and program switcher, KPI cards for total raised and donors, campaigns list with progress bars, donations trend chart, donor segments donut, and recent donations table.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a nonprofit fundraising admin dashboard — left sidebar with org and program switcher, KPI cards for total raised and donors, campaigns list with progress bars, donations trend chart, donor segments donut, and recent donations table.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
